Product & GTM partnership experience shaping product roadmap trade-offs, packaging/entitlements, and revenue operations alignment. M&A experience through sourcing, strategic diligence, and post-close operating model/integration planning. Modern cloud economics through understanding of COGS levers (compute, storage, egress), FinOps practices, and cost-to-serve optimization. Global leadership success operating across regions/time zones. What’s in It for You? At IPC, your compensation is only part of the package.
